title: Amtech A2955 0.7kg (24oz) Hand axe with wooden shaft
features: DURABLE: This sturdy 0.7kg (24oz) hand axe has a drop forged steel head and a strong, shaped wooden handle
BLADE GUARD: Supplied with safety blade guard, it is ideal for chopping and splitting wood
PRACTICAL SIZE: 24oz weight offers balance and control.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
COMPACT DESIGN: Versatile tool for carpentry, assembly, and general household repairs.
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Axe See more
